title: Modernization Process Model (MPM) Version 26.01.13
text:
The SAF/AQXP Strategic Change Management team has updated the MPM to version 26.01.13. This version of the model includes three new best practices/lessons learned documents and has had several AMIC processes updated to point to their new PowerApp Playbook when referencing various figures.
In addition, the MPM has a new version numbering format which will follow a format of YY.MM.DD so users will always know when the last time the model was updated.
If you have have any questions, comments, or suggestions please reach out to us using the the Contact Us page.
